record.field: Can Create Task On Internal ERP

['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', ('id', '=', 2), ('id', 'in', [247730, 331002]), ('is_partner', '=', True), ('opportunity_ids.x_studio_second_salesperson', '=', user.id), ('user_id.employee_ids.parent_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('parent_id.is_partner', '=', True), ('user_id', '=', user.id), ('id', 'in', user.env["res.users"].search(['|', ('active', '=', True), ('active', '=', False)]).filtered(lambda rec: rec.has_group('base.group_user')).partner_id.ids), ('id', 'in', user.env["res.company"].search([]).filtered(lambda rec:rec.partner_id).partner_id.ids), ('parent_id', 'in', user.env["res.company"].search([]).filtered(lambda rec:rec.partner_id).partner_id.ids)]

['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', ('id', '=', 2), ('user_id', '=', user.id), ('user_id.employee_ids.parent_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('opportunity_ids.active', '=', True), ('opportunity_ids.x_studio_second_salesperson', '=', user.id), ('id', 'in', user.env["res.users"].search(['|', ('active', '=', True), ('active', '=', False)]).filtered(lambda rec: rec.has_group('base.group_user')).partner_id.ids), ('id', 'in', user.env["res.users"].search(['|', ('active', '=', True), ('active', '=', False)]).filtered(lambda rec: rec.has_group('base.group_user')).partner_id.parent_id.ids), ('id', 'in', user.env["res.company"].search([]).filtered(lambda rec:rec.partner_id).partner_id.ids)]

['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', ('id', '=', 2), ('parent_id.supplier_rank','>', 0), ('supplier_rank','>', 0), ('status', 'in', ['customer','old_customer']), ('id', 'in', user.env["res.company"].search([]).filtered(lambda rec:rec.partner_id).partner_id.ids), ('id', 'in', user.env["res.users"].search(['|', ('active', '=', True), ('active', '=', False)]).filtered(lambda rec: rec.has_group('base.group_user')).partner_id.ids), ('id', 'in', user.env["hr.job"].search([]).filtered(lambda rec: rec.address_id != False).address_id.ids)]
Contact(customers, vendors and old customers) for administrative responsible
Contact(customer, old customer and in progress)
User can only see his/her goals or goal from the same challenge in board visibility(roles)

field.name: groups
field.eval: [(4, ref('base.group_portal')), (4, ref('role_marketing_manager')), (4, ref('role_email_manager')), (4, ref('role_community_manager')), (4, ref('role_infographiste')), (4, ref('role_webmaster')), (4, ref('role_sales_hot')), (4, ref('role_sales_cold')), (4, ref('role_operation')), (4, ref('role_it_person')), (4, ref('role_customer_referencer'))]

record.field: ['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', ('partner_id', '=', False), ('partner_id', '=', 2), ('partner_id.is_partner', '=', True), ('partner_id.parent_id.is_partner', '=', True), ('partner_id', 'in', [247730, 331002]), ('partner_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('partner_id', 'in', user.env["res.users"].search([]).filtered(lambda rec: rec.has_group('base.group_user')).partner_id.ids), ('partner_id.parent_id.user_id', '=', user.id), ('partner_id', 'in', user.env["res.users"].search([]).filtered(lambda rec: rec.has_group('base.group_user')).partner_id.parent_id.ids), ('partner_id', 'in', user.env["res.company"].search([]).filtered(lambda rec:rec.partner_id).partner_id.ids)]
